title: sorghum demissum
intro: Sorghum demissum, also known as broom sorghum, is a perennial plant belonging to the grass family (Poaceae) and is native to Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of sorghum demissum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of sorghum demissum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, skin irritations, and wound healing.
